theory.canonical_statement: ID 418 formalizes the detection and mapping of the neutrino "Ghost Field" as a proxy for the global normalization N of the TZP. Because neutrinos interact only through the weak force and gravity, they act as perfect sensors for the localized deltagnu [ID 404] without being disrupted by the intense electromagnetic stress energy within the torus. The operator Phinu utilizes the chirality of the neutrino (the 1 gamma 5 projection) to verify the "Twist" or helicity of the vacuum flow. By measuring the neutrino flux density relative to the 17.2 kHz acoustic carrier, the system can calculate the "Entropy Leakage" of the reactor in real time. This provides the final calibration layer for the Wwitness, ensuring that the energy extracted is perfectly balanced by the global manifold replenishment. Chiral Symmetry: Uses the left handed nature of the neutrino to orient the rotational direction of the Jp.
